introSection: Vicky The Ride is a steel spinning roller coaster at Plopsaland Ardennes in Stavelot, Liège, Wallonia, Belgium.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster is themed to the Studio 100 cartoon Vicky The Viking.

fullText:
Vicky The Ride is a steel spinning roller coaster at Plopsaland Ardennes in Stavelot, Liège, Wallonia, Belgium.

The coaster is themed to the Studio 100 cartoon Vicky The Viking.
